backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor for a portfolio backend, defining data types and CRUD operations for user profiles, blog posts, projects, services, skills, leads, SEO settings, social links, experiences, and testimonials, with access control and blob storage mixins.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report documenting a single high-confidence feature that reverts all frontend source files to their Version 12 state, listing the affected file paths and component dependencies.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON map of frontend file paths to short summaries describing the purpose and key implementation details of each page, component, and hook in the frontend.
frontend/index.css: Root Tailwind CSS entry file that defines CSS custom property design tokens for light and dark themes, covering colors, borders, charts, and sidebar variables.
frontend/index.html: Minimal HTML shell for the Vite/React app, mounting the React root div and loading the main TypeScript entry point.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Main React app file that configures TanStack Router with public and admin nested route layouts, lazy-loads all pages, and wraps the app in QueryClient and ThemeProvider.
frontend/src/components/AdminGuard.tsx: Route guard component that checks Internet Identity authentication and admin status, rendering login or access-denied screens for unauthorized users and the children for admins.
frontend/src/components/AdminSidebar.tsx: Admin panel sidebar component that renders navigation links to all admin sections with active-state highlighting based on the current route path.
frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx: Renders the site footer with navigation links, active social media icons fetched from the backend, a contact call-to-action, and a copyright line.
frontend/src/components/Layout.tsx: Wraps page content with a full-height flex layout including Navigation, Footer, and ProfileSetup components.
frontend/src/components/LoginButton.tsx: Button component that handles Internet Identity login and logout, showing loading state and clearing the React Query cache on logout.
frontend/src/components/Navigation.tsx: Sticky responsive navigation bar with desktop and mobile menus, active-route highlighting, social links, theme toggle, and login button.
frontend/src/components/ProfileSetup.tsx: Modal dialog that appears after login when no user profile exists, prompting the user to enter a name and optional email to create their profile.
frontend/src/components/SEOHead.tsx: Headless component that updates the document title and meta description based on per-page SEO settings fetched from the backend.
frontend/src/components/ThemeToggle.tsx: Icon button that toggles between light and dark themes using next-themes.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: React Query hook that creates and caches an authenticated or anonymous ICP actor, invalidating dependent queries whenever the identity changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useActorWrapper.ts: Thin wrapper around useActor that exposes a typed call helper ensuring the actor is available before invoking backend functions.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an InternetIdentityProvider and useInternetIdentity hook that manage ICP AuthClient lifecycle, persisting identity across reloads and exposing login/logout/status state.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Defines React Query hooks for all backend data operations including CRUD for blog posts, projects, skills, services, testimonials, leads, SEO settings, social links, experiences, and user profile/admin management.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet that imports fonts, configures Tailwind, and defines CSS custom properties for light/dark theme tokens (colors, sidebar, charts) plus utility component classes like glow effects and gradient text.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app with QueryClientProvider, InternetIdentityProvider, and the root App component.
frontend/src/pages/About.tsx: About page that displays skills grouped by category with progress bars and a testimonials section, fetching data via useGetSkills and useGetTestimonials hooks.
Admin page for managing blog posts with CRUD operations, debounced search, pagination, and a dialog form that auto-generates slugs from titles.
frontend/src/pages/admin/CategoriesManag: Admin page for managing project categories with CRUD operations, debounced search, pagination, and up/down reordering controls.
frontend/src/pages/admin/Dashboard.tsx: Admin dashboard displaying stat cards (projects, blogs, leads, etc.) and navigation cards linking to each admin management section.
frontend/src/pages/admin/ExperienceManag: Admin page for managing work experience entries with CRUD operations, search, pagination, and a form supporting dynamic responsibility list items.
frontend/src/pages/admin/Help.tsx: Admin help page rendering an accordion-based guide covering all admin panel sections such as projects, blog, SEO, and social links.
frontend/src/pages/admin/LeadsManagement: Admin page for viewing and deleting contact leads, with debounced search filtering and client-side pagination across a card-based list.
frontend/src/pages/admin/ProjectsManagem: Admin page for full CRUD management of portfolio projects, supporting drag-and-drop reordering, image uploads, category assignment, and active/inactive toggling.
frontend/src/pages/admin/SeoManagement.t: Admin page for creating, editing, and deleting per-page SEO settings (meta title/description), with debounced search and paginated card display.
frontend/src/pages/admin/ServicesManagem: Admin page for managing services with add/edit/delete functionality via a dialog form, debounced search, and paginated card list.
frontend/src/pages/admin/SkillsManagemen: Admin page for managing skills with category classification, experience values, search filtering, pagination, and create/edit/delete dialogs.
frontend/src/pages/admin/SocialLinksMana: Admin page for managing social links (GitHub, LinkedIn, X) with CRUD operations, search/pagination, toggle active state, and a dialog form for adding/editing links.
frontend/src/pages/admin/TestimonialsMan: Admin page for managing testimonials with debounced search, pagination, and a dialog form for creating/editing testimonial entries with author and message fields.
frontend/src/pages/Blog.tsx: Blog listing page that fetches and displays all blog posts as cards with title, description, and date, navigating to individual post pages on click.
frontend/src/pages/BlogPost.tsx: Individual blog post page that looks up a post by slug from the fetched posts list and renders its HTML content with SEO metadata and a back navigation button.
frontend/src/pages/Contact.tsx: Contact page with a lead submission form (name, email, message) and informational cards for email, location, and response time, using the useSubmitLead mutation with toast feedback.
frontend/src/pages/Experience.tsx: Displays a timeline of professional work experiences fetched via `useGetExperiences`, showing job title, company, period, description, and responsibilities with skeleton loading states.
frontend/src/pages/Home.tsx: Landing page that fetches and previews featured projects, services, and testimonials with a hero section, skeleton loaders, and navigation links to other pages.
frontend/src/pages/NotFound.tsx: Simple 404 error page with a large '404' display, a message, and buttons to navigate home or go back.
frontend/src/pages/Projects.tsx: Projects portfolio page that fetches projects and categories, supports category filtering, and renders project cards in a responsive grid with skeleton loading states.
frontend/src/pages/Services.tsx: Services page that fetches available services and provides a live search/filter input, displaying matching services in a responsive card grid with skeleton loaders.
frontend/src/pages/Skills.tsx: Skills page that groups fetched skills by category and renders each skill with a progress bar representing years of experience, sorted by a predefined category order.
frontend/src/pages/Testimonials.tsx: Testimonials page that fetches and displays client/colleague feedback in a card grid with star ratings, quote text, and author name, including skeleton loading states.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility functions for extracting URL parameters from both query strings and hash-based routing, with sessionStorage persistence helpers and a function to clean sensitive params from the URL hash.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration extending the default theme with custom fonts, OKLCH-based color tokens, border radii, box shadows, and plugins for typography, container queries, and animations.
project_state.json: Project state tracking file recording the schema version, existing features, and pending feature requests (AR-1 through AR-4) related to reverting the application to its Version 12 state.
